item.title: Google 宣布 Android 17 正式转型「智能系统」
item.guid: Google-宣布-Android-17-正式转型「智能系统」
item.description:
Today, Google held an Android Show launch event separately before the official I/O developer conference, officially announcing that Android will transform from an "operating system" to an "intelligent system," and Gemini Intelligence will become the core identifier of the Android platform: 今天，Google 在正式 I/O 开发者大会前单独举办了 Android Show 发布活动，正式宣布 Android 将从「操作系统」转型为「智能系统」，Gemini Intelligence 将成为 Android 平台的核心标识：

    The default keyboard Gboard has added multi-modal auto-fill capabilities, supporting information extraction from sources such as gallery photos, chat history, and emails;

    Regarding desktop widgets, Google plans to launch the "Create my widget" feature, allowing users to generate custom widgets through natural language commands;

    The voice input function has also been upgraded, with the new Rambler feature automatically organizing spoken language into structured text;

    Gemini's "proxy operation" capability has expanded from single-step tasks to multi-step tasks, supporting the direct initiation of complex commands by photographing real-world content;

    Android Auto simultaneously updates Gemini Intelligence proxy operations, optimized 3D road visuals, and smarter streaming media playback features, with some car models also supporting vehicle information memory.

In terms of hardware, Google has released a new laptop category, Googlebook, positioned as "the first hardware tailored for Gemini Intelligence," introducing a "shake cursor" method to summon Gemini, and also supporting direct execution of Android applications. 硬件方面，Google 发布了全新笔记本品类 Googlebook，定位为「首款为 Gemini Intelligence 量身打造的硬件」，引入「摇动光标」唤出 Gemini 的操作方式，还支持直接运行 Android 应用。

At the system level, Android 17 also brings a collaboration with Meta, where apps like Facebook and Instagram will support calling native camera functions; flat-style emojis have been upgraded to 2.5D. 系统层面，Android 17 还带来了与 Meta 的合作，Facebook、Instagram 等应用将支持调用原生相机功能；平面风格 emoji 升级为 2.5D 样式。

It is worth noting that Google also announced at the press conference that QuickShare's AirDrop compatibility feature will be extended to some models from brands such as OPPO, vivo, OnePlus, and Honor, with phased rollout expected in the second half of this year. 值得注意的是，发布会上 Google 还宣布 QuickShare 兼容 AirDrop 的功能将扩展至 OPPO、vivo、一加、荣耀等品牌的部分机型，预计今年下半年陆续推送。

item.title: 曝苹果 iOS 27 相机将支持自定义布局、加入 Siri 模式
item.guid: 曝苹果-iOS-27-相机将支持自定义布局、加入-Siri-模式
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is planning a complete redesign of the Camera app in iOS 27, introducing a fully customizable control layout. Users can switch to "Advanced" for customization, with each shooting mode having independent widgets that can be selected from a translucent "Add Widget" tray sliding up from the bottom. 据彭博社报道，苹果正计划在 iOS 27 中对相机应用进行全面改版，引入完全可定制化的控件布局。用户可切换至「高级」进行自定义，每种拍摄模式均有独立的小组件 (widgets)，可从底部滑出的半透明「添加小组件」托盘中选取。

    Advanced options for photo mode include depth of field and exposure control, with controls grouped into three categories: "Basic," "Manual," and "Settings";

    The control overview entry, originally located in the upper right corner of the interface, has been moved to the right of the shutter button, and new grid and level options have been added;

    The Camera App will also include a Siri mode, integrating visual intelligence features, supporting operations such as plant identification and text translation.

Additionally, the report also revealed changes that multiple system apps will bring in iOS 27: 此外，报道还透露了 iOS 27 多个系统 App 将带来的改变：

    Safari will get a new start page with four new tabs at the top, allowing quick switching between Favorites, Bookmarks, Reading List, and Browsing History;

    The Weather App's main page will add a "Weather Conditions" panel, supporting direct viewing of rainfall and wind speed data in addition to temperature, without needing to navigate to sub-pages;

    The image creation app "Image Playground" has been completely redesigned, with a simpler generation interface and an image editing entry for "describing modifications."

item.title: 腾讯张军：微信已读和访客功能「已焊死」，不会开发
item.guid: 腾讯张军：微信已读和访客功能「已焊死」，不会开发
item.description:
Recently, the topic "WeChat Status to launch visitor records" trended on hot searches. Yesterday, WeChat employee "Kecun Xiao Jiang" posted a clarification, stating that the trending topic was highly misleading. He explained that WeChat Status recently tested two features "within a very small scope," both of which have now been stopped: 近日，「微信状态将推出访客记录」相关词条登上热搜。昨天，微信员工「客村小蒋」对此发文澄清，称热搜话题存在较大误导性。他解释，微信状态近期在「极小范围内」测试了两项功能，且目前均已停止：

    Display of status view count: After a user posts a status, they can see the number of views for that status within its validity period, showing only the count and not involving specific users;

    Randomly displaying avatar bubbles of passing friends on the status page, which can be clicked to view the status posted by the other party, aiming to promote interaction among friends who post statuses.

Zhang Jun, Tencent's PR director, subsequently reposted the Weibo and added that the small-scale test of the view count feature was misunderstood by users, stating, "This is our responsibility." 腾讯公司公关总监张军随后转发该微博并补充表示，此次小范围测试浏览人数的功能被用户误解，「这是我们的责任」。

He further emphasized that the read receipt and visitor features had previously received clear objections from users multiple times, stating, "These two features are welded shut; they will not be developed, nor will they be provided." 他进一步强调，已读功能和访客功能此前已多次收到用户明确反对意见，「此二项功能已焊死，不会开发，不会提供」。

item.title: Ilya 自曝仍持有 OpenAI 约 70 亿美元股权：不希望它被毁掉
item.guid: Ilya-自曝仍持有-OpenAI-约-70-亿美元股权：不希望它被毁掉
item.description:
According to reports from the Los Angeles Times, CNBC, and Wired, the lawsuit filed by Musk against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman continued to be heard on the 11th local time. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella and OpenAI co-founder Ilya Sutskever successively testified in court. 据《洛杉矶时报》、CNBC 及《连线》报道，马斯克诉 OpenAI 及 CEO Sam Altman 一案于当地时间 11 日继续审理。微软 CEO Satya Nadella、OpenAI 联合创始人 Ilya Sutskever 相继出庭作证。

Nadella stated on the witness stand that Musk had never communicated with him regarding whether Microsoft's investment in OpenAI violated any relevant commitments. He said Microsoft was "very proud" of its early investment in OpenAI and emphasized that the collaboration between the two parties had clear commercial attributes from the outset. Nadella 在证人席上表示，马斯克从未就微软对 OpenAI 的投资是否违反相关承诺与其进行过沟通。他称微软对 OpenAI 的早期投注感到「非常自豪」，并强调双方合作自始便具有明确的商业属性。

Regarding the OpenAI board's dismissal of Altman in 2023, Nadella described it as "amateurish operation," stating that he had never received a convincing explanation for it. 对于 OpenAI 董事会在 2023 年解雇奥特曼一事，Nadella 形容为「业余操作」，称其始终未能获得令人信服的解释。

Ilya Sutskever subsequently testified, disclosing that he still holds approximately $7 billion in equity in OpenAI's for-profit entity, making him one of the largest known individual shareholders. Ilya Sutskever 随后出庭披露，自己仍持有 OpenAI 营利性主体约 70 亿美元的股权，是目前已知持股规模最大的个人股东之一。

Sutskever admitted to having participated in pushing for Altman's brief dismissal in 2023 and stated that he had a strong sense of belonging to OpenAI, "just didn't want to see it destroyed." On the issue concerning Musk's core demands, Sutskever stated that OpenAI's transformation into a for-profit structure was a consensus among all parties. Sutskever 承认曾参与推动 2023 年奥特曼被短暂解职一事，并表示自己对 OpenAI 抱有强烈的归属感，「只是不想看到它被毁掉」。在涉及马斯克核心诉求的问题上，Sutskever 表示 OpenAI 转型为营利性架构是各方共识。

item.title: 小米免费发放 100 万亿 Token
item.guid: 小米免费发放-100-万亿-Token
item.description:
Xiaomi announced yesterday the official launch of the "MiMo Orbit 100T Token Program," offering free Token benefits to global AI users, with a plan to cumulatively distribute 100 trillion Tokens within 30 days. 小米昨日宣布正式启动「MiMo Orbit 100T Token 计划」，面向全球 AI 用户免费发放 Token 权益，计划在 30 天内累计发放 100 万亿 Token。

Lu Weibing, Partner and President of Xiaomi Group, reposted relevant content, stating that as of yesterday morning, the program had cumulatively distributed nearly 80 trillion Tokens. 小米集团合伙人、总裁卢伟冰转发相关内容表示，截至昨天上午，该计划已累计送出近 80 万亿 Token。

Xiaomi Technology officially cited the latest data from OpenRouter, showing that Hermes Agent's daily Token call volume reached 291 billion, with over 1.75 trillion calls in the past week. In the model call volume ranking, MiMo ranked first, cumulatively contributing 1.45 trillion Token calls in the past month. 小米技术官方援引 OpenRouter 最新数据显示，Hermes Agent 日 Token 调用量高达 2910 亿，最近一周调用量超 1.75 万亿。在模型调用量排名中，MiMo 位居第一，最近一个月累计贡献 1.45 万亿 Token 调用量。

item.title: 李想：理想自研芯片不是跟风，要做 AI 时代的「N 项全能」
item.guid: 李想：理想自研芯片不是跟风，要做-AI-时代的「N-项全能」
item.description:
Li Xiang, CEO of Li Auto, posted on Weibo yesterday, stating that Li Auto's venture into chip development is not "burning money to follow trends," but rather to enable AI to truly operate in the physical world and to solve problems that existing supplier technologies cannot overcome with self-developed chips. 理想汽车 CEO 李想昨日在微博发文表示，理想做芯片并非「烧钱跟风」，而是为了让 AI 能够在物理世界真正落地运行，用自研芯片解决现有供应商技术无法攻克的难题。

In his post, Li Xiang referenced Apple, pointing out that Apple achieves the best experience not by having the strongest single technology, but by its full-chain independent design and full-chain independent responsibility for self-developed chips, operating systems, hardware, and cloud services. 李想在文中以苹果为参照，指出苹果能做到体验最好，依靠的并非某一项技术最强，而是自研芯片、操作系统、硬件与云服务的全链条自主设计与全链条自主负责。

He emphasized that Li Auto's goal is "to bring AI into the physical world and provide users with an Apple-like experience," but "not by making phones or imitating UI design, but by its integrated hardware-software co-design delivering an excellent experience." 他强调，理想的目标是「把 AI 带进物理世界，并给大家像苹果一样的体验」，但「不是做手机、模仿 UI 设计，而是它软硬一体的联合设计能带来卓越的体验」。

Accordingly, Li Auto is currently simultaneously advancing in directions such as self-developed chips, operating systems, large models, and hardware, which Li Xiang defines as "full-domain co-design for the era of artificial intelligence." 据此，理想目前正同步推进自研芯片、操作系统、大模型与硬件等方向，李想将其定义为「面向人工智能时代的全域联合设计」。

Only by achieving "N-skill all-around" can one become a champion in user experience.

item.title: 全国首例 AI 代写种草笔记案终审：赔偿 10 万元，AI 批量炮制「数字泔水」构成侵权
item.guid: 全国首例-AI-代写种草笔记案终审：赔偿-10-万元，AI-批量炮制「数字泔水」构成侵权
item.description:
The Hangzhou Intermediate People's Court in Zhejiang Province recently disclosed the final judgment in the nation's first unfair competition case involving AI-generated "product recommendation notes." 浙江省杭州市中级人民法院近日披露全国首例涉 AI 代写「种草笔记」不正当竞争案终审判决。

The court ruled that the AI writing tool jointly operated by Company B and Company C, which targeted a well-known social platform as its application layer, mass-generated product recommendation content and induced users to publish it, constituted unfair competition. The court ordered the two companies to cease relevant services and pay 100,000 yuan in compensation. 法院认定，B 公司和 C 公司共同运营的 AI 写作工具，以某知名社交平台为定向应用层，批量生成种草文案并诱导用户发布，构成不正当竞争，判决两公司停止相关服务并赔偿 10 万元。

The accused tool offers three versions: web, app, and WeChat mini-program. Popular modules are directly named "Xiaohongshu Recommendation Copy" and similar. Membership costs 40 yuan per month, and a lifetime membership is 168 yuan. 被诉工具提供网页版、App 及微信小程序三个版本，热门模块直接以「小某书种草文案」等命名，会员收费月付 40 元、终身会员 168 元。

The "technological neutrality defense" asserted by the two companies was not supported. The court pointed out that technology itself is neutral, but its commercial application must comply with platform rules and legal boundaries. 两公司主张的「技术中立抗辩」未获支持，法院指出技术本身中立，但商业化应用须遵守平台规则与法律底线。

item.title: 乔布斯纪念币正式开售：25 枚装售价 61 美元
item.guid: 乔布斯纪念币正式开售：25-枚装售价-61-美元
item.description:
According to MacRumors, the U.S. Mint officially began selling a Steve Jobs-themed $1 "American Innovation dollar coin" yesterday, offering two purchase options: a roll of 25 coins for $61 (approximately $2.44 per coin), and a bag of 100 coins for $154.50. 据 MacRumors 报道，美国铸币局昨日正式开售一枚以史蒂夫 · 乔布斯为主题的 1 美元「美国创新纪念币」，提供两种购买规格：25 枚装一卷售价 61 美元（约合每枚 2.44 美元），100 枚装一袋售价 154.50 美元。

The obverse of the coin features a young Steve Jobs, dressed in his iconic turtleneck, jeans, and sneakers, seated in front of a natural landscape in Northern California. 硬币正面呈现了年轻时期的乔布斯，身着标志性的高领毛衣、牛仔裤和运动鞋，坐于北加利福尼亚州的自然风景前。

item.title: 京东一季度收入 3157 亿元，年度活跃用户超 7.4 亿连续 10 季双位数增长
item.guid: 京东一季度收入-3157-亿元，年度活跃用户超-7.4-亿连续-10-季双位数增长
item.description:
JD.com released its Q1 2026 financial report yesterday. 京东昨日发布了 2026 年一季度财报。

First-quarter revenue increased by 4.9% year-on-year to RMB 315.7 billion; net profit attributable to ordinary shareholders of the company was RMB 5.1 billion, compared to RMB 10.9 billion in the same period last year. Service revenue reached RMB 70.9 billion, a year-on-year increase of 20.6%.

  • JD Retail's first-quarter revenue was RMB 268.59 billion, a year-on-year increase of 1.8%; 京东零售一季度收入为 2685.9 亿元，同比增长 1.8%；
  • As of the end of the first quarter, JD's annual active users exceeded 740 million, achieving double-digit growth for 10 consecutive quarters since Q4 2023; 截至一季度末，京东年度活跃用户数超 7.4 亿，自 2023 年四季度以来已连续 10 个季度实现双位数增长；
  • New businesses, including JD Waimai, JD Property, Jingxi, and international business, generated RMB 6.28 billion in revenue in the first quarter, a year-on-year increase of 9.1%; 包括京东外卖、京东产发、京喜及海外业务在内的新业务一季度收入为 62.8 亿元，同比增长 9.1%；
  • First-quarter marketing expenses increased by 45.8% from RMB 10.5 billion in the same period last year to RMB 15.4 billion, mainly for new business promotion; 一季度营销开支由去年同期 105 亿元增加 45.8% 至 154 亿元，主要用于新业务推广；
  • R&D expenses increased by 48.6% from RMB 4.6 billion to RMB 6.9 billion, used for technology capability building and talent investment. 研发开支由 46 亿元增加 48.6% 至 69 亿元，用于技术能力建设与人才投入。

In terms of employee scale, the total number of personnel in the JD system currently exceeds 900,000. The company previously disclosed that it has provided 28,000 housing units for frontline employees and plans to invest RMB 22 billion over the next five years to provide 150,000 "JD Service Homes." 员工规模方面，京东体系人员总数目前已超 90 万。公司此前披露，已面向一线员工提供 2.8 万套住房，并计划未来 5 年投入 220 亿元，提供 15 万套「京东服务者之家」。

item.title: 💡 「vibe coding」概念提出者：AI 输出终局是「交互式神经视频」，现在先试试 HTML
item.guid: 💡-「vibe-coding」概念提出者：AI-输出终局是「交互式神经视频」，现在先试试-HTML
item.description:
Andrej Karpathy, the proponent of "vibe coding" and a founding member of OpenAI, posted on X yesterday, publicly supporting Claude Code team member Thariq's advocacy for "replacing Markdown with HTML." 「vibe coding」概念提出者、OpenAI 创始成员 Andrej Karpathy 昨日在 X 上发文，公开力挺 Claude Code 团队成员 Thariq 提倡的「以 HTML 取代 Markdown」做法。

Karpathy believes that the output format of large models is gradually upgrading: plain text is difficult to read, Markdown is better, and HTML goes a step further, supporting richer layouts, charts, and interactions. He predicts that there will be multiple iterations in the future, culminating in "interactive neural videos" directly generated by AI. Karpathy 认为，大模型的输出格式正在逐步升级：纯文本难以阅读，Markdown 好一些，HTML 则更进一步，支持更丰富的排版、图表和交互。他预测未来还将经历多轮迭代，终点是由 AI 直接生成的「交互式神经视频」。

Karpathy pointed out that about one-third of the human brain is dedicated to processing visual information, and vision is the most efficient channel for receiving information. Therefore, it is most natural for humans to "speak" to AI using voice, and AI should "present" results to humans as visually as possible. Karpathy 指出，人类大脑约三分之一专门用于处理视觉信息，视觉是接收信息效率最高的通道。因此，人类向 AI 「说话」用语音最自然，AI 向人类「展示」结果则应尽量用视觉呈现。

He also admitted that existing input methods are not enough — relying solely on voice or text lacks the spatial sense of "pointing at something on the screen while speaking." Until a better solution emerges, he suggests users directly add "structure the response as HTML" at the end of their prompts and then open it in a browser to view . 他同时承认，现有的输入方式还不够用 —— 光靠语音或文字，缺少「指着屏幕某处说话」这种空间感。在更好的方案出现之前， 他建议用户直接在提示词末尾加上「将回复结构化为HTML」，然后在浏览器里打开查看 。

🔗 Related reading: Is Markdown Dead, Long Live HTML? 🔗 相关阅读： Markdown 已死，HTML 当立？

item.title: 390 万元起，宇树发布全球首款量产版载人变形机甲 GD01
item.guid: 390-万元起，宇树发布全球首款量产版载人变形机甲-GD01
item.description:
Yesterday, Unitree Robotics released the GD01 manned transforming mecha, starting at RMB 3.9 million. 昨天，宇树科技发布 GD01 载人变形机甲，售价 390万元起。

Official test videos show that the GD01 can punch down a brick wall. According to reports, the GD01 is the world's first mass-produced manned mecha, supporting transformation and also serving as a civilian transport vehicle, weighing approximately 500kg (after carrying a person). 官方实测视频显示，GD01 可一拳将砖墙锤倒。据介绍，GD01 是全球首款量产版载人机甲，支持变形，同时也可作为民用交通工具，体重约 500kg（载人后）。

Finally, Unitree did not forget to remind: "Please use robots in a friendly and safe manner." 最后宇树还不忘提醒：「请大家友好安全地使用机器人」。

item.title: Hermes Agent 推出后台控制 Mac 电脑功能
item.guid: Hermes-Agent-推出后台控制-Mac-电脑功能
item.description:
The AI agent framework Hermes Agent recently launched the "Computer Use (macOS)" feature, allowing AI to control Mac computers to complete complex tasks without the user's awareness — the mouse cursor does not move, windows do not pop to the foreground, and keyboard focus does not switch. AI 智能体框架 Hermes Agent 近日推出「Computer Use (macOS)」功能，AI 可以在用户毫无感知的情况下控制 Mac 电脑完成复杂任务 —— 鼠标光标不移动，窗口不弹到前台，键盘焦点不切换。

Hermes' desktop control feature is not tied to a specific AI model and can be used with Claude, GPT, Gemini, or open-source models running locally. Hermes 的桌面控制功能不绑定特定 AI 模型，可与 Claude、GPT、Gemini 或在本地运行的开源模型配合使用。

In terms of security mechanisms, Hermes has multiple layers of restrictions on high-risk operations. Actions such as emptying the trash, forced deletion, and screen lock/logout are strictly blocked, and actions like clicking and typing require user confirmation by default before execution. 在安全机制方面，Hermes 对高风险操作设有多层限制，清空废纸篓、强制删除、锁屏注销等操作被硬性屏蔽，点击、输入等动作默认需要用户确认后才会执行。

item.title: 豆包输入法登陆 macOS 平台
item.guid: 豆包输入法登陆-macOS-平台
item.description: Yesterday, Doubao Input Method for macOS was officially launched on the official website, version 0.9.0, supporting macOS 10.15 and above. The Windows version shows "Coming Soon." 昨天，豆包输入法 macOS 版正式上架官网，版本号 0.9.0，支持 macOS 10.15 及以上版本。Windows 版显示「敬请期待」。

item.title: Claude Code 新增 Agent View：一个界面管理所有并行任务
item.guid: Claude-Code-新增-Agent-View：一个界面管理所有并行任务
item.description:
Claude Code launched the "Agent View" feature, allowing users to uniformly manage all Claude Code sessions in a single interface. It is currently available as a research preview to Pro, Max, Team, Enterprise, and Claude API plan users. Claude Code 推出「Agent View」功能，允许用户在同一界面统一管理所有 Claude Code 会话，目前以研究预览版形式向 Pro、Max、Team、Enterprise 及 Claude API 计划用户开放。

Users can press the left arrow key in any session, or execute the claude agents command in the terminal to enter Agent View. Each row in the list displays the session name, a summary of the latest reply, and the last interaction time. 用户可在任意会话中按左方向键，或在终端执行 claude agents 命令进入 Agent View。列表中每行显示会话名称、最新回复摘要及最后交互时间。

After selecting a session, you can preview the content of the most recent round of dialogue; for tasks you wish to run in the background, you can use the /bg command to move them to the background, or directly start a new session in background mode with the claude --bg [task] command. 选中某一会话后，可预览最近一轮对话内容；对于希望在后台运行的任务，可使用 /bg 指令将其转入后台，或通过 claude --bg [task] 命令直接以后台模式启动新会话。

item.title: 网易有道发布大模型聚合平台 ThinkFlow，一次接入调用 20+ 款模型
item.guid: 网易有道发布大模型聚合平台-ThinkFlow，一次接入调用-20+-款模型
item.description:
Recently, NetEase Youdao Smart Cloud launched ThinkFlow, an enterprise-grade large model aggregation platform. Through standardized API interfaces, it integrates over 20 mainstream large models such as DeepSeek, Kimi, Qwen, and MiniMax into a unified scheduling system, allowing enterprises to flexibly switch between multiple models after a single integration. 近日，网易有道智云推出企业级大模型聚合平台 ThinkFlow，通过标准化 API 接口，将 DeepSeek、Kimi、Qwen、MiniMax 等 20 余款主流大模型纳入统一调度，企业完成一次接入后即可在多模型间灵活切换。

ThinkFlow provides a full-link Token consumption visualization dashboard, accurately tracking large model invocation costs down to the single request level. At the same time, the platform uniformly hosts all API keys and supports deploying model services on enterprise-owned servers or private cloud environments, with all invocation data processed on the enterprise side. ThinkFlow 提供全链路 Token 消费可视化看板，将大模型调用成本精确到单次请求级别。同时，平台统一托管所有 API 密钥，并支持将模型服务部署于企业自有服务器或专属云环境，调用数据全程在企业侧处理。

Official disclosures reveal that ThinkFlow's underlying architecture originates from NetEase's internal large-scale business practices and has undergone practical verification in scenarios such as NetEase Youdao, NetEase Games, NetEase Cloud Music, and NetEase Smart Enterprise, supporting a smooth transition from small-scale proof-of-concept to large-scale production environments. 官方披露，ThinkFlow 底层架构源自网易内部大规模业务实践，已在网易有道、网易游戏、网易云音乐、网易智企等场景中完成实战验证，支持从小规模概念验证到大规模生产环境的平滑过渡。

item.title: 任天堂社长：Switch 2 不排除再涨价
item.guid: 任天堂社长：Switch-2-不排除再涨价
item.description:
According to ComicBook and Nintendo Everything, Nintendo President Shuntaro Furukawa stated during the investor Q&A session following yesterday's financial report that there is a possibility of another price increase for the Switch 2 in the future, and the company will maintain "flexibility" in its pricing strategy. 据 ComicBook、Nintendo Everything 报道，任天堂社长古川俊太郎在昨日财报发布后的投资者问答环节中表示，Switch 2 未来存在再度涨价的可能性，公司将在定价策略上保持「灵活性」。

Previously, Nintendo had announced that it would raise the price of the Switch 2 later this year, with the US market price increasing from the initial suggested retail price of $450 to $500, a $50 increase; the Japanese market saw a maximum increase of 400 RMB. 此前，任天堂已宣布将于今年晚些时候上调 Switch 2 售价，美国市场价格将从首发建议零售价 450 美元提升至 500 美元，涨幅 50 美元；日本市场最高涨幅达 400 元人民币。

Shuntaro Furukawa stated that the price increase was not driven by a single factor, but rather a combination of soaring component costs such as memory, fluctuating exchange rates, and rising oil prices. He said that maintaining the original pricing would lead to a significant deterioration in hardware profitability, which would in turn have a medium to long-term negative impact on the company's overall business. 古川俊太郎表示，推动本次涨价的并非单一因素，而是内存等元器件成本飙升、外汇汇率波动及油价上涨等共同作用的结果。他称，若维持原有定价，将导致硬件盈利能力大幅恶化，进而对公司整体业务产生中长期负面影响。

The trend of rising component prices may not only continue this year but also extend into next year. The company hopes to "maintain pricing flexibility" and be prepared to respond.

This statement is widely interpreted as not ruling out the possibility of another price increase. He also added that if market conditions return to normal, a price reduction would also be considered. 这一表态被外界普遍解读为不排除再次上调售价的可能。他同时补充，若市场行情回归常态，售价下调同样在考虑范围之内。

item.title: 短视频新规出台：6 类必选标签缺一不可、「含有 AI 生成内容」必须标注
item.guid: 短视频新规出台：6-类必选标签缺一不可、「含有-AI-生成内容」必须标注
item.description:
Yesterday, the "Wangxin China" official WeChat account published an article, disclosing new regulations for content labeling features on short video platforms: 昨天，「网信中国」公众号发文，披露了针对短视频平台内容标注功能的新规：

All website platforms must provide users with 6 categories of "mandatory tags" and make content labeling a required step for short video publishing. Publishers must select one of these to complete the publication, which are: 各网站平台必须为用户提供 6 类「必选标签」，并将内容标注设为短视频发布的必经环节，发布者须从中选择一项才能完成发布，分别为：

"Contains fictional/interpretive content," "Contains AI-generated content," "Contains marketing information," "Content is reposted," "Content is personal opinion," and "No labeling required." Among these, short videos that record real-life can choose "No labeling required," and this tag will not be displayed externally on the short video page.

For content that is not properly labeled, platforms must supplement or correct the labels and provide educational warnings to relevant publishers. The Cyberspace Administration of China stated that in the next step, it will strengthen guidance, supervision, and inspection of website platforms, and will severely punish and publicly expose accounts that fail to label as required and platforms that do not effectively implement their primary responsibilities. 对未规范标注的内容，平台须进行补标或纠正，并对相关发布者进行教育警示。中央网信办表示，下一步将加大对网站平台的指导督促和监督检查力度，对未按要求标注的账号及主体责任落实不力的平台，将依法严惩并公开曝光。

item.title: 油墨原料短缺，日本薯片包装变黑白
item.guid: 油墨原料短缺，日本薯片包装变黑白
item.description:
According to Nikkei Asia, affected by the ongoing tensions in the Middle East, Japanese renowned food company Calbee announced that starting May 25, it will gradually replace the packaging of some of its products with versions that use only black and white colors. 据《日经亚洲》报道，受中东局势持续紧张影响，日本知名食品企业卡乐比（Calbee）宣布，将于 5 月 25 日起陆续将旗下部分产品的包装更换为仅使用黑白两色的版本。

Calbee stated that due to the tense situation in the Middle East, the supply of some raw materials has become unstable. With the inability to predict the direction of the situation in Iran, the company has made stable supply its top priority. 卡乐比表示，由于中东局势紧张，部分原材料供应趋于不稳定，公司在无法预测伊朗局势走向的情况下，将稳定供应列为最优先事项。

item.title: 马修 · 麦康纳新片《国王的对手》首曝预告
item.guid: 马修-·-麦康纳新片《国王的对手》首曝预告
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," the first trailer for Matthew McConaughey's new film "The Rivals of Amziah King" has been officially released. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，马修 · 麦康纳主演新片《国王的对手》（The Rivals of Amziah King）首支预告片正式曝光。

The film is directed by Andrew Patterson, with McConaughey starring as Amziah King, a music-loving beekeeper living in rural Oklahoma. The plot revolves around the sudden return of his adopted daughter; together they run a beekeeping business, but it is deliberately sabotaged by villains, forcing them to fight back. 影片由安德鲁·帕特森执导，麦康纳在片中饰演 Amziah King，一位生活在俄克拉荷马乡村、热爱音乐的养蜂人。剧情围绕其养女突然归来展开，两人共同经营养蜂事业，却遭恶人蓄意破坏，被迫奋起反击。

item.title: 曝《西部世界》将拍新电影，《侏罗纪公园》编剧大卫 · 科普操刀剧本
item.guid: 曝《西部世界》将拍新电影，《侏罗纪公园》编剧大卫-·-科普操刀剧本
item.description:
According to Deadline, screenwriter David Koepp will write the screenplay for Warner Bros.' "Westworld" film, and a heavyweight director is already in talks for the project, though the specific individual has not yet been disclosed. 据 Deadline 报道，编剧大卫 · 科普（David Koepp）将为华纳兄弟撰写《西部世界》（Westworld）电影剧本，项目已有一位重量级导演正在洽谈中，具体人选尚未披露。

The story of "Westworld" originates from Michael Crichton's 1973 self-written and self-directed film of the same name, which tells of an adult theme park where wealthy tourists can experience cowboy life in the Old West, and which descends into chaos when robot gunslingers malfunction and begin genuinely shooting guests. 《西部世界》的故事源自迈克尔 · 克莱顿（Michael Crichton）1973 年自编自导的同名电影，讲述一座供富裕游客体验西部牛仔生活的成人主题乐园，因机器人枪手发生故障、开始真实射杀游客而陷入恐慌。
